calendar.matters:
Petition For Allowance Of Extraordinary Compensation To Attorney For Extraordinary Services Provided By Paralegal
Off Calendar Apr-10-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kerry Sykes for Gary Mac Gurn.

Ms. Sykes stated that she has heard no objections. The Court stated that this appears to be appropriate, that the work needed to be done and that it has no problem with the Paralegal doing the work. The Court granted the Petition for Allowance of Extraordinary Compensation to Attorney for Extraordinary Services Provided by Paralegal (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
